reviews.review_description: It's a fun game which you do need to think about (which I like) but you definitely need a spinny chair so you can turn properly and not fall also I can only play a couple of levels at a time before it gets repetitive so I would prefer some music or reward like a well done, also some voices in it would be great because it feels like a void
Much appreciated gamepad control too
I'm loving this game. Despite others commentaries I haven't had any motion sickness.
Game is great. Some of the sharpest graphics ive seen in Gear VR, but why these developers need access to phone calls and photo access will alwayd bug me. Hence the theee stars.
This game is amazing on Go and performs like a dream. This is pretty much the same game on both platforms. Escape rooms that make your brain work. Fantastic!

Update: This is fixed now. Thanks. The game is fun. I definitely recommend it.

Original review: I don’t know if it’s a bug on my oculus go or how the game was designed but the game doesn’t appear 3d to me. It’s almost as if I’m watching 360 video. The game seems really cool so I hope this is just a bug which will get patched but at the moment it unfortunately doesn’t feel like vr.
Amazing game. Was hesitant to purchase. The sale pushed me over. But if I knew it was this fun and immersive I would have bought it long ago.  It's perfect.
This game is the best game I've ever played.
This game was awesome! Had some challenging rooms to get past.I would recommend this game to anyone.spent hours and hours playing!

reviews.review_title: I am in one of my favorite movies
reviews.review_description: What an awesome game! Some puzzles are easy, but I am only on level 17, but fun none the less. Fantastic immersion. Movement and gravity shift is just super cool. If you are a fan of the movie cube, cube2 and cube zero, then it's a must own. Great job! I am having so much fun!

developer_response.body:
That's great! Thank you for your feedback!
Marta

reviews.review_description:
I was getting tired of the rail point and click games, this is refreshing.  No motion sickness at all, some people just have weaker stomachs than others. It's s blend of Portal (game) meets Cube (movie)

Great game!!
Motion sickness for me and i can't turn around with My gamepad .

The developers really care about your experience. They asked me and others for feedback on the new control system and wanted to ensure it was comfortably for those with motion sicness while still keeping the original controls for those like me who never get motion sickness. Oh and the game is really fun too :)
Have had a lot of fun playing
It's immersive and fun to play through. Keep it in the library for friends and family if you're social like that.

Grab this one! Occasionally amazing vr experiences hit the oculus store and this is one of them. Favorite puzzle game ive tried so far, and ive tried a few now.

One thing i would like is if they added a walking mechanic based off your headset shaking up and down or something so i could truly walk instead of using the controller. The graphics are good and the concept of a rotating room always takes me a bit to figure out for each level. Feels a little like portal but without the gun. Thank you devs! Best game i picked up in the sale.
This is the only VR game that gives me serious motion sickness. Can't play more than a minute. But that might be just me.
Needs an controller option.  It's terrible to play only stand or on a swivel chair.

developer_response.body: We support connected Bluetooth controllers in the game.

reviews.review_description: I would have given it a perfect 5 stars but the motion sickness is too much so 4 stars it is!! Great concept though as love the idea for puzzles!! Bravo!!
Wont even start up.
